name: /standards-remove: --dry-run prints intent without writing (per §2.14 dry-run contract)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id my-source --dry-run && grep "id: my-source" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: my-source
  name: My
  url: https://my.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
